verification_questions.question: Does deleteExpiredBlobs correctly delete uploaded blobs past the configurable retention period (default 7 days) while retaining blobs within the period and blobs not yet uploaded?
evidence_needed: SQL query uses uploaded_at < cutoff with correct timestamp math
Tests verify deletion after 8 days, retention after 3 days, retention when uploaded_at is null

verification_questions.question: Does evictToQuota enforce the storage quota (default 500MB) via LRU eviction of the oldest uploaded blobs, and does it never evict unuploaded (queued) blobs?
evidence_needed: SQL query orders by uploaded_at ASC
Tests verify oldest evicted first, unuploaded preserved even when over quota

verification_questions.question: Does the cleanup logic correctly retain blobs that are referenced by multiple message_media entries when any reference has upload_status != 'uploaded' (multi-identity safety)?
evidence_needed: NOT EXISTS subquery checks all message_media references
Tests verify retention when any reference is pending/uploading, deletion when all are uploaded

verification_questions.question: Is the IPC channel for manual cleanup trigger (nostling:media:cleanup) properly registered and does it accept configurable retentionDays and quotaBytes parameters?
evidence_needed: Handler passes options through to runCleanup()

verification_questions.question: Is there any dead code, unused imports, or unreachable logic in the cleanup and quota enforcement implementation?
evidence_needed: Review of all cleanup-related methods for unused code paths

verification_questions.question: Is there any duplicated logic between deleteExpiredBlobs and evictToQuota that should be consolidated?
evidence_needed: Both methods share similar SQL patterns - assess if deduplication is warranted

verification_questions.question: Are the tests comprehensive enough to validate the cleanup behavior end-to-end, including edge cases like boundary conditions, orphaned blobs, and concurrent upload status?
evidence_needed: Test coverage of boundary (exactly 7 days), orphan blobs (no message_media), uploading status retention, same-identity multi-message references

verification_questions.question: Does the implementation cover all 9 scope items from the story definition: cleanup scheduler, retention period, blob deletion, quota calculation, LRU eviction, multi-identity retention, never evict queued, configuration, and IPC channel?
evidence_needed: Map each scope item to implementation code

verification_questions.question: Does runCleanup correctly orchestrate both phases (retention cleanup then quota enforcement) in the right order, and does phase 2 account for deletions made in phase 1?
evidence_needed: runCleanup calls deleteExpiredBlobs first, then evictToQuota
evictToQuota recalculates usage after phase 1 deletions
